name: Lupe Castillo
bio: Lupe Castillo is listed as the Republican candidate for IL-04 in public 2026 ballot reporting. The seat is open in 2026 after Rep. Chuy Garcia's retirement. (Source: Shaw Local candidate list, March 5, 2026: https://www.shawlocal.com/northwest-herald/2026/03/05/illinois-primary-ballot-heres-whos-running-in-the-march-17-election/)
